//: paths is explicitly cleared (overrides the inherited alias from tsconfig.json).
for fast local builds. When that alias is active here, TypeScript pulls in all of
tooling-core's source files transitively, violating the rootDir constraint since
those files live outside this package's directory.
With paths:{} cleared, @datalackey/tooling-core resolves through node_modules to
the built dist/ instead — an external package not subject to rootDir.
Requires tooling-core to be built first (guaranteed by dependsOn: ^build).
